title: WhimCraft
description: This mod adds a series of features used by the author when creating modpacks.
body:
### Multiplayer:
- Beautified multiplayer server list;
- External login verification.
### Optimizations:
- Backported the ChunkPurge.
### Modular Machinery: Community Edition:
- Provides ME Essentia Input/Output Buses, allowing convenient supply of essentia for recipes. When Gugu Utilities is installed, it can also supply essentia for Gugu Utilities;
- Allows registration of additional parallel controllers (requires manual handling of models & textures (modularmachinery:blockparallelcontroller\_whimcraft\_\[x\]));
- Provides additional MMCE adapters;
- When holding any AE wireless terminal, structures can be automatically built using items from AE (fluids are not yet supported).
### JEI/Crt:
- Use hotkeys to directly obtain item IDs from JEI: press K to get an item ID, press L to get a list of item IDs;
- Added the getDrops method for obtaining mob loot;
- Added the sendTitle method for sending title messages.
### AE2/NAE2/Mekeng:
- Modified the storage types of all storage components;
- Displays who encoded the encoded patterns.
### Nature's Aura:
- Toggle whether Natural Pneuma triggers chunk updates.
### Astral Sorcery:
- Modified the maximum starlight level (overrides the settings in the original Astral Sorcery config file).
### Extra Utilities 2:
- Adjusted the power output of the Rainbow Generator.
### Botania:
- Displays the mana cost for Rune Altar and Mana Pool recipes;
- Generating flowers can directly transfer mana to Mana Pools using the Wand of the Forest.
### Mob Grinding Utils:
- XP Tap supports converting other XP fluids into experience orbs.

All features are disabled by default and must be manually enabled.
